titleStmt.title: SII 5.762: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 762. (A.R. No. 198 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kojaṭilavarmmarāna tribhuvanaccakra vattikaḷ śrīkulaśekharade vaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir nāṟpattu Iraṇṭāvatu vṛści kanāyaṟṟu Āṟān tiyatiyum paurṇai yum pra haspativāra mum peṟṟa kāttikai nāḷ teṉ
ārināṭṭu citranadi Uttaratira ttu dakṣi ṇakāśi yil muṉṉāḷ Aṇṇāḻvi parākramapāṇḍyade var tiruvuḷḷampaṟṟi Uṭaiyār viśvanātha ṉaiyum pratiṣṭi ppittu tirukkoyil Upānādi stūpipariyan=tam garbhagṛ ham Arddhamaṇḍa pam Iṭaināḻikai
mahāmaṇḍapam sopāna m Ivaiyuṅ kuṟaivaṟat tiruppaṇiyuñ ceyvittu Āvaraṇa go purādi kaḷum ceyvittu pūjai kku nityanaimi ttikaṅkaḷukku veṇṭum tevatāṉamum viṭṭu Utsavaparyan=ta māyuḷḷa karmma ṅkaḷum naṭatti Aṉai
ttuk kottil veṇṭuvāraiyuṅ kaṟpittu naṭantupotukacceyte nāmum Iṉaṉāyaṉāṟkut tiruvolakkamaṇḍa pamāka ku lacekaraṉ ma ṇṭapamun tiruppaṇi ceyvittu muṉpu kaṟpitta per niṅkalāka Eṭṭām paṅku devakarmma mākak kaṟpi
tta kāśyapagotra ttu bodhāyanasūtra ttu śivaśa raṇīśvara muṭaiyāṉ vikramapāṇḍyabhaṭṭa ṉaiyum Oṉpatām paṅku nampāka kaṟpitta kāśyapagotra ttu bo[dhāya]nasūtra ttu Aḻutakaṇāṟṟiṉāṉ puṣpavanabhaṭṭa ṉaiyum Oṉpatām pa
ṅku devakarmma mākak kaṟpitta bhāradvājagotra ttu bodhāyanasūtra ttu mutaliyāṉa sundarapāṇyabhaṭṭa ṉaiyum kaṟpittu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa paṟṟile nāṟpattu Iraṇṭāvatu pacāṉamutalukku kā
rpacāṉam Uḻutukoḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpittu Irupattoraṭik kolāl per Oṉṟukku Orumā Arai nilamāka nālumā varai nilam Iṟaiyiliyum per Oṉṟukku patiṉmuṉṟu muḻattu maṉai Oṉṟāka maṉai muṉṟum
toṭṭakkūṟukaḷum viṭṭu devakarmmam śivaśaraṇīśvara muṭaiyāṉ vikramapāṇḍyabhaṭṭa ṉum mutaliyāṉa sundarapāṇḍyabhaṭṭa ṉum taṅkaḷ viḻukkāṭu nāḷ parikarmma mum naṭatti pūjai kkuṟaiyum Ārāyntu Uṭaimai nīṅ
kalākap per Oṉṟukku nāḷtoṟum Irunāḻi Arici prasā tamāka nāṉāḻi Arici prasāda mum peṟṟu Uṭkoyil puṟakkoyi luṭpaṭa Acaṟpaṅkukku Otta mariyāti turamum ceytu cuvantiraṅka ḷuḷḷatum peṟṟup
potumpaṭiyum nampu Aḻutakaṇāṟṟiṉāṉ puṣpavanabhaṭṭa ṉum taṉ viḻukkāṭu Uḷḷa nāḷ Uṭaiyār viśvanātha ṉaiyum nācciyār Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiya nācciyāraiyum pūjittu maṟṟum Uṭkoyil
puṟakkoyilkaḷil nāyaṉmāraiyum pūji ttu Acal nampukku Otta mariyāti Uṭaimaiyum cuvantiraṅkaḷum peṟṟup potumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile Iṉṉāḷ mutaluk
ku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka Iṟaiyili nilam nālumā Araiyum maṉaikaḷum toṭṭakkūṟukaḷum Uṭaimai nīṅkalākak kaṟpitta prasādam nāṉāḻiyu maṟṟumuḷḷa svatantraṅ kaḷum peṟṟuk
kaṟpitta mariyātiyile turak kuṟaikaḷum tirntu candrāditya vaṟ cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu san=tatipraveśa me kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum pāṟka
Ivai karuvūṟ poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu la tulyam
Digital edition of SII 5.762 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
